transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I prepared marinated blue crabs for today's mukbang
I was going to do 10 of each
I set it up earlier and it was way too high
So here are 8 of both flavors
I did a soy-marinated crab mukbang before
I ordered that from Ilmi from Jangan (city)
I ordered from the same place today
This is going to be great
Bon appetit
The ice machine on my fridge is broken
And this is the only cold drink I have today
The apple juice is in the fridge now
Don't spill
Bon appetit It looks tasty
That's so delicious

That's insane
That sound
The cat?
So cute
Will I be able to eat this piece?
It's not easy to eat
The claw meat is really good
It's not salty
The shells are in the back
Okay, the sauce is salty
I'm going to mix rice in there later
[Chat: I'm worried about your teeth]
I'll be careful
Spicy crab
This one tastes amazing too They are all berried
Crazy

[Chat: Put on gloves]
Bon appet.. What?
My teeth are okay as of now
Can you guys see the orange eggs?
The legs are filled with meat too
I like both flavors
I liked the spicy when I was younger
But if they are full of meat with eggs, I like the soy sauce more
[Chat: Eat both at once] That's 1 way to eat it
It's already oozing out
So good It's really not salty
Well as for the taste,
I like eating it like this, but
I heard they pick out the meat for you
I want to show you guys the perfect squeeze
What can I do about the sauce getting on my mouth?

That made it worse
It's spicy
It tastes great But it's spicy
Let's cut it in half
[Chat: Where's the rice?] It's okay, it's not salty
When will I finish it all?
You guys can eat a lot of crabs too, no?
Like 6-7 per person?
I'll cut them in half
To make it easier to eat
Anyone allergic to it?
Right, I see
Thankfully I'm not allergic to any foods
So good
It's so much easier to eat since they're smaller But it's so spicy!
It'll be really hard to eat rice while doing this I'll eat it later

So spicy
[Chat: The apple juice from the fridge]
How do you guys know that!?
Did I tell you guys earlier..?
Really good
That was a lot of meat
See the meat?
My arm!
Blood
It's so tasty
See the guts?
As for the guts,
They're greenish
And the eggs are orange
[Chat: How old are you?] I turned 25 this year
I keep writing "2020"

And also say "I'm 24"
But today, I said it correctly
This tastes amazing
What is this?
Guys,
I have a great idea How about I squeeze out everything in 1 place and eat that with rice?
Let's proceed

Some spicy marinated meat
They're both so good
Put in the soy sauce marinated

The visuals
Really tasty
To describe it,
It's so flavorful

Also the guts
Not fishy at all
Delicious
Really
I'm almost finished

The spicy one is really yummy
Yummy
I like the soy sauce ones when they're eaten separately
But the spicy ones are better with rice
There's a reason why I'm eating it slowly
I'm scared that there will be shells in here
I store it in my cheeks And slowly eat them
Checking for small shells

So refreshing
